title: Task 2: Deep Audit, Strategy Development & Share with Travis
description:
Please use Corey's preliminary audit as a foundation for conducting a comprehensive SEO audit and developing a full strategy for Goody Garage Doors. If this work has already been completed or is in progress, please let me know in the comments and share the client-facing SEO audit here.

Once the audit and strategy are finalized, I will share the findings with Travis Trentham. Corey will present the findings and strategic plan to Sandi during our call on May 21st for review and alignment.

Context: During the Welcome Call on April 24, 2026, Travis requested a clear strategy document that includes timelines and a gap analysis. He wants to ensure that his internal goals align with the team's direction before execution begins.

Reference: https://3.basecamp.com/4226914/buckets/46283651/todos/9864259387

title: Task 1: Share Preliminary SEO Audit Folder with SEO Team
description:
Hey Corey, can you share the preliminary SEO audit folder (previously shared with Sandi) with the internal SEO team so they can use it as a foundation for a deeper, more comprehensive audit? This task is part 1, part 2 would be for theo seo team to deliver -  Task 2: Deep Audit, Strategy Development & Share with Travis - J411 Goody Garage Doors

Context: During the Welcome Call on April 24, 2026, Sandi mentioned that Corey shared an SEO audit with her. Travis requested to see this SEO audit. He's looking for a clear strategy document with timelines and gap analysis. He wants to ensure his internal goals are aligned with the team's direction before execution begins.

cc:

title: Create new offers page
description:
Seeking help and advise on how we can proceed w/ the creation of the offers page please.

Domain - https://goodygaragedoors.com/


Desired URL - goodygaragedoors.com/offers


Adding ticket verbatim for more info:

Summary: Goody Garage Doors is requesting two related updates. First, the current homepage offer ($50 off opener) should be swapped out for the new free insulation upgrade offer. And Add all new offers to the homepage.

Second, a new Offers page needs to be built out on the website. Sandi has approved the visual direction for the Offers page via a shared Google Doc. An Excel file with offer details has also been provided.


Client Goal: Ensure current promotions are visible and aligned on the website — swap the homepage offer and build a dedicated Offers page so site visitors see the same offers being run in active ad campaigns.


Requirements for Completion:


New Offers Page:

  • New Offers page is created at goodygaragedoors.com/offers/
  • Page is built out using the visual layout referenced in the Google Doc (Offers tab): https://docs.google.com/document/d/1d_BB2BaWvBYq66tqcVWcr8Wzhv9djaIccC0HkRo6rO4/edit?tab=t.klkh9967g24d
  • Offers doc explaination https://www.loom.com/share/69730bdd2ad44343938b8a7741347bf8
  • All current offers from the provided Excel file are included on the page
  • Page formatting and styling is consistent with the rest of the Goody Garage Doors website
  • New Offers page is accessible from the homepage banner


Deadline: No hard deadline stated, but the client has an active campaign running (radio and ads) that references the insulation upgrade offer — the website should reflect this as soon as possible. Treat as a priority.


Excel file from client:


I have created a similar offers sheet based on how we normally create the offers from Apex. But please still feel free to provide feedback incase this one is different.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1wRB12EGuqfi6mdhfTNOy0Rt9DKiUlAXTdHYdDj2rpAk/edit?gid=1130115168#gid=1130115168



Thanks much!

title: J411 Goody Garage Doors - zap test 1
